steps.title: Introduce the name list
steps.content: The sentence has an independent clause ending with served in Congress, followed by a list of two specific people. The punctuation must introduce that list.

steps.title: Choose list punctuation
steps.content: Choice A's period and Choice C's semicolon make the following names a fragment or the wrong relation; Choice D lowercases the proper noun Congress. A colon correctly introduces the names. The answer is B.
